name: Rhubarb Quick Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white sugar, can use part, Sugar-Twin
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
2. Mix together in this order: brown sugar, white sugar, oil, egg, buttermilk, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, vanilla, and flour.
3. Add the diced rhubarb and chopped nuts to the mixture.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Top with a mixture of brown sugar and margarine.
6. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour (or less for mini pans).
